title: CronJob — Job template
text:
The
.spec.jobTemplate
defines a template for the Jobs that the CronJob creates, and it is required.
It has exactly the same schema as a
Job
, except that
it is nested and does not have an
apiVersion
or
kind
.
You can specify common metadata for the templated Jobs, such as
labels
or
annotations
.
For information about writing a Job
.spec
, see
Writing a Job Spec
.
